questions.question: What is a dense embedding?
options: A sparse weight per vocab token
One fixed-size vector per text where cosine similarity ranks passages by semantic proximity
questions.explanation: Dense embeddings give one vector per text (typically 384-3072 dim); cosine ranks similarity.
options_zh: 每个词表 token 一个稀疏权重
每段文本一个固定大小向量，cosine similarity 按语义相近度对 passage 排序
questions.explanation_zh: Dense embedding 给每段文本一个向量（通常 384-3072 维）；cosine 给出相似度排名。

questions.question: What does Matryoshka Representation Learning enable?
options: Truncating a trained embedding to its first N dimensions and getting a still-useful smaller embedding
questions.explanation: Matryoshka training makes the first N dims of the vector standalone-useful, enabling cheap truncation.
questions.question_zh: Matryoshka Representation Learning 能带来什么？
options_zh: 把训练好的 embedding 截断到前 N 维，仍能得到一个有用的小 embedding
questions.explanation_zh: Matryoshka 训练让向量的前 N 维可独立使用，便于廉价截断。

questions.question: How do multi-vector (ColBERT) embeddings score query-doc pairs?
options: MaxSim: for each query token find the most similar document token, then sum the maxima
questions.explanation: ColBERT-style late interaction uses MaxSim across per-token vectors.
questions.question_zh: 多向量（ColBERT）embedding 如何为 query-doc 对打分？
options_zh: 对均值池化的 token 向量做 cosine
MaxSim：每个 query token 找最相似的 document token，再把 maxima 求和
questions.explanation_zh: ColBERT 风格的 late interaction 在每 token 向量上用 MaxSim。

questions.question: What does BGE-M3 output simultaneously?
options: Dense, sparse, and multi-vector (colbert) representations from one model in a single inference
questions.explanation: BGE-M3 emits three retrieval modes from one model, useful for fused hybrid scoring.
questions.question_zh: BGE-M3 在一次推理中同时输出什么？
options_zh: Dense、sparse 和 multi-vector (colbert) 表示，由同一个模型一次推理产出
questions.explanation_zh: BGE-M3 从一个模型同时产出三种检索模式，便于做混合融合打分。

questions.question: Why must you re-normalize a Matryoshka-truncated vector before cosine similarity?
options: Truncation changes the vector norm; without re-normalizing, dot product no longer equals cosine
questions.explanation: Re-normalizing after truncation restores unit norm so dot product equals cosine again.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 Matryoshka 截断后的向量在 cosine similarity 之前必须重新归一化？
options_zh: 截断改变向量范数；不重归一化时点积不再等于 cosine
questions.explanation_zh: 截断后重新归一化恢复单位范数，让点积再次等于 cosine。

questions.question: Why do BGE models often need a query-side prefix string?
options: BGE was trained with an explicit query prompt; omitting it costs 3-5 points recall
questions.explanation: BGE models expect a 'Represent this sentence for searching...' prefix on queries.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 BGE 模型常常需要 query 端的前缀字符串？
options_zh: BGE 训练时用了显式的 query prompt；不带它会损失 3-5 点召回
前缀改变 tokenizer 行为
questions.explanation_zh: BGE 模型期望 query 带 'Represent this sentence for searching...' 前缀。

questions.question: Why is MTEB necessary but not sufficient for picking an embedding model?
options: Leaderboard ranks are average across many tasks; your specific domain may differ, so always benchmark on your data
questions.explanation: MTEB averages across tasks; domain-specific eval can flip the ranking.
questions.question_zh: 为什么说 MTEB 必要但不充分以挑选 embedding 模型？
options_zh: 排行榜排名是跨众多任务的平均；你具体领域可能不同，所以总要在自己数据上 benchmark
questions.explanation_zh: MTEB 跨任务取均；领域特定评估可能反转排名。

questions.question: When should you add SPLADE sparse retrieval alongside dense embeddings?
options: When queries are keyword-heavy or contain identifiers/codes that dense embeddings blur
questions.explanation: SPLADE captures lexical/keyword matches that dense models can miss; fuse with dense via RRF.
questions.question_zh: 什么时候应该把 SPLADE 稀疏检索加在 dense embedding 旁边？
options_zh: 只要 encoder 是多语言
查询关键词重，或包含 dense embedding 会模糊化的标识符/代码时
questions.explanation_zh: SPLADE 捕捉 dense 模型可能漏掉的词法/关键词匹配；通过 RRF 与 dense 融合。
